---
title: 'Fort Worth Museum of Science and History: A Review'
date: '2014-03-23T05:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '644042643050748320'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/fort-worth-museum-of-science-and.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<h2>Fort Worth Museum of Science and History</h2><h3>Fort Worth, Texas</h3><h3><ul style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica Neue LT Std', 'Helvetica LT Std', Helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 17.999940872192383px; list-style: none; margin: 5px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><li class="address" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><b class="street-address" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">1600 Gendy St</b></li><li class="address" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Arlington Heights</li><li class="directions" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><a class="biz-directions" href="http://www.yelp.com/map/fort-worth-museum-of-science-and-history-fort-worth" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; color: #3b65a7; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline;">Get Directions</a></li><li style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><span class="i-wrap ig-wrap-biz_details i-phone-biz_details-wrap mapbox-icon" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; line-height: 16px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 21px; position: relative; vertical-align: baseline;"><i class="i ig-biz_details i-phone-biz_details" style="background-color: transparent; background-image: url(/images/imported/s3-media3-ak-yelpcdn-com/biz-details-a93d8d3cb899.png); background-position: -3px -678px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border: 0px; display: block; font-size: 14px; height: 14px; left: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; position: absolute; top: 1px; vertical-align: baseline; width: 14px;"></i><span class="offscreen" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; clip: rect(0px 0px 0px 0px); font-size: 14px; height: 1px; left: -9999px; margin: 0px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; top: auto; vertical-align: baseline; width: 1px;">Phone number</span><span class="biz-phone" itemprop="telephone" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">(817) 255-9300</span></span></li><li style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><span class="i-wrap ig-wrap-common i-external-link-grey-common-wrap mapbox-icon" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; line-height: 16px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 21px; position: relative; vertical-align: baseline;"><div class="biz-website" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz_redir?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.fortworthmuseum.org%2F&amp;src_bizid=Uil3htd5WcwTSIm7c4v9wA&amp;cachebuster=1395456867&amp;s=fbcbffda9d411304edac7e667693e7ce2f471e7186b052e9224de58bbdbac429" style="background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border: 0px; color: #3b65a7; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline;" target="_blank">fortworthmuseum.org</a></div></span></li></ul></h3><h4>Rating (5 Being the Best)</h4><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">3.89</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: left; margin-right: 1em; text-align: left;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tree-from-wizard-of-oz-76667fb66240.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="Tree From Wizard of Ox Exhibit at Fort Worth Museum of Science and History.  Attribution: Darrell G. Wolfe www.LifeInFortWorth.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tree-from-wizard-of-oz-76667fb66240.jpg" height="480" title="Tree From Wizard of Ox Exhibit at Fort Worth Museum of Science and History.  Attribution: Darrell G. Wolfe www.LifeInFortWorth.Com" width="640" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Attribution: Darrell G. Wolfe <a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/">www.LifeInFortWorth.Com</a></td></tr></tbody></table><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div></h3><h4>Overview</h4><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">The Museum is a great place to hang out with the kids.</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">You walk into the big glass doors and work through the entrance/ticket area. If you head left there is a cafeteria. Left up the stairs you find exhibits, often the traveling exhibit is located upstairs. Also upstairs you find the Cowboy exhibit where you can see cowboy history.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">To your right you find a wing full of hands on fun like building paper things that might be able to fly in the wind tunnel, building with wooden blocks, a dark room to play with lights, and more.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">Further down the hall you find a Dino area, mining exhibit, and a smaller kids play area. Outside there is a small water area.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">The whole place is actually VERY small, compared to the <a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/perot-museum-of-nature-and-science-dallas-2" target="_blank">Perot Museum</a>, but also less crowded, usually.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">If you felt that you wanted a place that was indoors (summer AND winter resistant) to take the kids for a few hours once or twice a month, this would be a good one to have on your list. There are many hands on things to do and that in and of itself usually keeps them busy for a while.</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">Incidentally there is plenty of seating for parents to watch their kids play with stuff.</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">As with any popular place I'd advise going on a Mon - Thu and not on a weekend to avoid the crowds.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">The kids had fun and didn't want to leave when we did. We have passes, so we'll be back.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div></h3><h4>Cost</h4><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">Honestly when it comes to places like this I think of them as recurring places, annual pass, type places. That way I can go when I want, for how long I want, and not feel I need to "see everything" while I'm there.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">I'll tell you now, I don't know that it's worth the cost just to go once.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium;">Non Annual Pass Holders: Paid Parking (+/- $5)</div><div style="font-size: medium;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium;">Annual Pass Holders: Park Free.&nbsp;</div></h3><h4>Kids</h4><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">The kids enjoy this place. Especially when we go during non busy days/hours. They can play and enjoy themselves touching things.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div></h3><h4>Tips to enjoy it better...</h4><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">Get an annual pass if you are local.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">ANNUAL PASS HOLDERS: Get free entrance to BOTH Fort Worth Museum of Science and History AND the Perot Museum... At last they do this year and last year.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div></h3><h4>Final Thoughts</h4><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">It's small but enjoyable, especially if you go often just for a fun outing.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">See Other Reviews on <a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/fort-worth-museum-of-science-and-history-fort-worth" target="_blank">Yelp: Click Here</a></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div></h3><h4 style="font-size: medium;">Pictures</h4><div><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/buiding-with-plastic-magnets-and-light-6e3e3501f51c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/buiding-with-plastic-magnets-and-light-6e3e3501f51c.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/building-a-stick-house-b4969678cf61.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/building-a-stick-house-b4969678cf61.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/guitar-motion-sensor-27bd6744d666.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/guitar-motion-sensor-27bd6744d666.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/supersized-light-bright-1eb7d8dd0bfb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/supersized-light-bright-1eb7d8dd0bfb.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tower-of-sticks-c7635009c7cb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tower-of-sticks-c7635009c7cb.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b></div></h3><h4>Blog Connect:</h4><h3><ul style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li><li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></li><li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li><li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li></ul></h3><h4>Connect:</h4><h3><div style="clear: both; float: left; font-size: medium; font-weight: normal; padding-bottom: 10px;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-436ed0b74b58.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-0d130abda9d2.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-df42b17a5900.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-d57cc3305733.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;&nbsp; </div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div></h3><h4>Disclaimers<b>:</b></h4><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><i>* This information is AS IS. I make no assumptions to know everything, or be up to date. I am a fellow traveler passing on what I learn to you. If you need official assistance from a professional, please get that help from them.&nbsp;</i></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><i><br /></i><i>*Affiliate Links may be included. In some instances I make money from the reviews of products or services I do here. In some cases I get a few freebies as well. Nevertheless, I only leave my honest reviews. This is how I see it. They can pay me to review, they can't pay me for how my review turns out. Please see my full disclosure list at:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start Here - About</a>.&nbsp;</i></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"></div></h3><h4 style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: auto; word-spacing: 0px;"><b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4>
